CRN_missions_1 = {
 slot = 5
 generic = no
 ai = yes
 potential = {
 tag = CRN
 }
 has_country_shield = yes

 CRN_support_bards = {
 icon = mission_have_culture
 required_missions = { }
 position = 1
 provinces_to_highlight = {
 culture = cornish
 }
 trigger = {
 num_of_owned_provinces_with = {
 culture = cornish
 value = 3
 }
 }
 effect = {
 add_country_modifier = {
 name = CRN_cornish_revival
 duration = -1
 }
 if = {
 limit = {
 has_estate = estate_church
 }
 complex_dynamic_effect = {
 first_custom_tooltip = CRN_if_the_clergy_supports_cornish
 first_limit = "
 has_estate_privilege = estate_church_religious_culture
 "
 first_effect = "
 change_estate_land_share = {
 estate = estate_church
 share = -5
 }
 "
 }
 }
 }
 }

 CRN_cornish_renaissance = {
 icon = mission_court
 required_missions = { CRN_support_bards }
 position = 3
 provinces_to_highlight = {
 owned_by = ROOT
 culture = cornish
 }
 trigger = {
 prestige = 50
 }
 effect = {
 add_prestige = 10
 if = {
 limit = {
 has_dlc = "Mandate of Heaven"
 }
 add_splendor = 200
 }
 else = {
 add_prestige = 25
 }
 }
 }
}
